chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-329 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 30.03.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, along with ASI Riaz Rango PS Satellite Town Mirpurkhas and ASI Manzoor Ali PS Tando Yousuf. ----- Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio advocate is holding brief on behalf of Raja Hans Raj Naurang advocate for petitioners who is reportedly busy before Honourable Supreme Court. I.O is present and submits that statement u/s 164 CrPC of petitioner No.1 / alleged abductee has been recorded before the Magistrate concerned in which she has reiterated about her freewill marriage with petitioner No.2 and hence he is going to dispose of the case under “C” class and submit such report before the Magistrate concerned. This petition having served its purpose is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
